# Accessible Animation Presets

## Rules

- Respect reduced motion preferences.
- Do not animate layout in ways that block reading.
- Keep entrance animations short and non-essential.
- Avoid decorative motion that distracts from the product, offer, or CTA.

## Presets

- `fade-up-subtle`: opacity and 8px translate, 180ms.
- `image-reveal`: opacity only, 220ms.
- `cta-hover`: color or shadow change without size shift.
